title: Custom eggless baby shower cakes for Rosehill and Camellia families
summary:
Planning a baby shower near Rosehill and want one thing off your list: no eggs, no questions asked?

At Harris Park, that's not a special order — it's the standard. Every cake is 100% eggless. Six sizes, 15 flavours including Rasmalai and Ferrero Rocher, any design from a photo reference. Buttercream, fondant, or ganache, your choice.

48 hours minimum notice. Not a delay — that's what fresh baking actually takes. Pickup from Wigram Street, minutes from Camellia and Rosehill, open until 10pm daily.

Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725. We speak Hindi and Gujarati too.
keywords: eggless baby shower cake without asking
